name: Will Calhoun
abstract: William Calhoun (born July 22, 1964) is an American drummer who is a member of the rock band Living Colour.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: Will and I… I went up to Will’s and we rehearsed. I played keyboard with him. We’d come up with how we would play the “Fifth World” and he worked out his part that worked with mine.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: I got the great Will Calhoun on drums... These two guys and Tisziji and myself... that’s how this album was done.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023
